productDisplayName: Nike Men Multicourt White Sports Shoes
description: Superior grip in an ultra-lightweight package, these Multi Court tennis shoe from nike come with ample cushioning and support to help you slam those winning aces. Team this with tennis performance clothes when hitting the court, or simply pair them with jeans and t-shirts for that casual look.UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlaysLacing system for a snug, customised FitTextile inner lining for the collar and tongue to offer optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protectionPadded tongue with brandingPull loopMidsolePhylon midsole for impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with brand logo styled lugs and ergonomic grooves for absolute grip and tractionPivot point at the big toe mound with brand logo for easy 180 degree movement of the footShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
